seo.title: Top 10 Things to Do in Ålesund, Norway
seo.description: Discover 10 must-see landmarks in Ålesund, Norway. Free GPS routes, photos, and history.
seo.intro: Planning a trip to Ålesund? Explore the best places to visit in Ålesund, Norway.
keywords: best places to visit in Ålesund

places.name: Jugendstilsenteret
places.description: National Art Nouveau centre in the former Swan Pharmacy building in central Ålesund.
places.seo_phrase: Jugendstilsenteret — Art Nouveau museum in Ålesund

places.name: Atlantic Sea-Park
places.description: One of Scandinavia's largest saltwater aquariums, built into the coastline at Tueneset west of Ålesund.

places.name: Mount Aksla
places.description: Panoramic viewpoint above Ålesund with 418 steps from Byparken and the Fjellstua restaurant at the summit.

places.name: Ålesund Church
places.description: Art Nouveau stone parish church rebuilt after the 1904 fire, dominating the centre of Ålesund on Aspøya.

places.name: Sunnmøre Museum
places.description: Open-air folk museum in Borgundgavlen with historic houses, boat collections, and a medieval exhibition.

places.name: Alnes Lighthouse
places.description: Historic lighthouse on Godøya island with café, small museum, and views of the open Atlantic.
places.seo_phrase: Alnes Lighthouse on Godøya near Ålesund

places.name: Giske Church
places.description: 12th-century white marble parish church on Giske island, northwest of Ålesund.

places.name: Borgund Church
places.description: Medieval stone cruciform church east of Ålesund, rebuilt after the 1904 fire within its historic walls.
places.seo_phrase: Borgund Church medieval stone church Ålesund

places.name: Runde Island
places.description: Bird cliff island west of Ålesund famous for puffins, gannets, and the Runde Environmental Centre.
places.seo_phrase: Runde Island bird cliffs near Ålesund

places.name: Volsdalen Church
places.description: Modern red wooden parish church on Nørvøya in eastern Ålesund, consecrated in 1974.
